ours.name: Darius
ours.ability: You start knowing how many male characters are in play.

ours.name: Thomas
ours.ability: You start knowing two characters: one is in play and one is a bluff.

ours.name: Alex
ours.ability: On Night 1, create an ability for yourself, agreed to by the Storyteller. A Minion learns a clue as to its nature.

ours.name: Geoffrey
ours.ability: If you die at night, all evil players are drunk the next day and night.

ours.name: Josh
ours.ability: You are safe from the Demon.

ours.name: Miles
ours.ability: Once per game, at night*, you may choose that a living Townsfolk the most steps from you dies.

ours.name: Ross
ours.ability: Each night, choose a character: learn if that character's player has higher or lower ELO than you. If not in play, the info is arbitrary.

ours.name: Eitan
ours.ability: Each night*, you may choose a dead player. If evil, they lose their ghost vote. If good, you lose this ability.

ours.name: Jimmy
ours.ability: You start knowing how many of Kat's 2 alive neighbors are evil. [+1 Kat]

ours.name: Marin
ours.ability: You start knowing the largest number of female characters adjacent to each other.

ours.name: Eliza
ours.ability: When the dead equal or outnumber the living, all players learn you are the Eliza. If you are mad about being Eliza, lose this ability.

ours.name: Samantha
ours.ability: Each day, if you correctly publicly guess which Minion(s) and Demon(s) characters are in play, a living minion is drunk till dawn.

ours.name: Marlie
ours.ability: Each night*, if you nominated a player that day, learn their alignment. If you learn evil, lose this ability.

ours.name: Kat
ours.ability: Once per game*, at night, select a living player. If they agree, they become Jimmy.

ref.name: Botanist
ref.ability: Your living Townsfolk neighbors' abilities yield false info.

ref.name: Hoplite
ref.ability: You are safe from the Demon. If all living Hoplites have been chosen by the Demon, they all die tonight. [+1 to +2 Hoplites]

ref.name: Poet
ref.ability: You start knowing half a piece of true info. Another good player starts knowing the other half.

ref.name: Caver
ref.ability: Once per game, at night, choose a player: they are safe from the Demon for 3 nights & 3 days, even if you are dead.

ref.name: Sentry
ref.ability: Each night, choose a character: learn how many steps from the other Sentry to that character. If not in-play, arbitrary. [+1 evil Sentry]

ref.name: Blacksmith
ref.ability: Once per game, at night, choose a player (not yourself): the next time they die, they don't.

ref.name: Coachman
ref.ability: Once per game, publicly choose up to 3 players. Tonight, if any are evil, all chosen good players die.

ref.name: Elemental
ref.ability: If you die at night, a Minion might die.

ref.name: Tanner
ref.ability: On your 1st day, publicly choose any number of players. That many nights later, you learn how many are evil.

ref.name: Rat Catcher
ref.ability: If you are nominated & the nominator is a Minion, they are executed immediately.

ref.name: Masons
ref.ability: Start knowing a secret word. If there is only 1 Mason, a Minion learns the word. [+0 to +2 Masons]

ref.name: Griffin
ref.ability: Once per game, visit the Storyteller: if no living Minions or Outsiders, learn the Demon player. Otherwise, false info.

ref.name: Treant
ref.ability: When the dead equal or outnumber the living, all players learn you are the Treant. If mad about it, lose this ability.

ref.name: Wayfinder
ref.ability: You start knowing if you are closer to the Demon than to a Minion. If equidistant, arbitrary.

ref.name: Tailor
ref.ability: Each night, choose a player: if executed tomorrow, they learn you are the Tailor.

ref.name: (Surveyor)
ref.ability: On your first day, publicly guess the distance between you and the nearest player of each character type. That night, learn how many you got right.

ref.name: Crabber
ref.ability: Once per game during the day, visit the Storyteller for advice that would help the other team win.

ref.name: Bouncer
ref.ability: Each night, choose a player (different than last night). Players that choose them tonight are prompted to choose differently.

ref.name: Scout
ref.ability: You are unaffected by Minion abilities. If chosen by a Minion, you learn this.

ref.name: Brownie
ref.ability: Each night*, choose a character: if in play and drunk or poisoned, gain & immediately use their ability.

ref.name: Inquisitor
ref.ability: Each night*, learn your nominee's alignment. If you learn evil, lose this ability.

ref.name: Longbowman
ref.ability: Once per game, at night*, kill 1 of the Townsfolk with the most steps (living players only) between you.

ref.name: Whaler
ref.ability: Start knowing 1 in-play Minion: if you nominate & execute them, tonight learn the Demon player.

ours.name: Michael
ours.ability: On your first night, choose a player (not yourself). If they die by execution, you become evil. If it was the Demon, you become the Demon.

ours.name: Brett
ours.ability: On your first night, you learn a Townsfolk character. You have that character's ability. If you are mad as ANY character, you might be executed.

ours.name: Lissie
ours.ability: You think you are a Townsfolk, but you are not. Once per game, during the day, a Minion can privately guess who Lissie is. If correct, you become evil that night. Minions learn you are in play.

ours.name: Brooke
ours.ability: You must ask permission from the nominee before nominating. If you nominate without granted permission, you might die that night.

ref.name: Colossus
ref.ability: You may not leave your seat to talk in private.

ref.name: Samurai
ref.ability: On your first night, choose a player (not yourself). If they die by execution, you become evil tonight. [≈ Michael Dell]

ref.name: Contrarian
ref.ability: You may only nominate if another player is about to die. (Golem-like)

ours.name: Matt
ours.ability: Once per game, at night*, you may choose 2 players to swap characters. If Matt is swapped, the new Matt is poisoned.

ours.name: Sam
ours.ability: You know who Michael is. [+1 Michael]

ours.name: Zoe
ours.ability: Each night, choose a player: they learn you are in play & the previously chosen player guesses who you are: if wrong, they die.

ours.name: Simone
ours.ability: Each night*, choose a player, if their character is a partner to the most recent executed player, then they die.

ref.name: Mimic
ref.ability: Each day the 1st living player to be publicly mad you are good might die tonight. You might register as good & as a Townsfolk or Outsider.

ref.name: Kobold
ref.ability: Each night, choose a player: they learn this. If nominated by a good player tomorrow, they are immediately executed.

ref.name: Mare
ref.ability: On your 1st night choose a player: they are poisoned. If mad that they are poisoned, they might die. If they die, choose again.

ref.name: Outlaw
ref.ability: Each night, choose a player: they learn you are in play & the previously chosen player guesses who you are: if wrong, they die.

ref.name: Warlock
ref.ability: Each night, choose a player: if nominated tomorrow, their nominator dies. At 3 players alive, you lose this ability.

ref.name: Homunculus
ref.ability: Start knowing an in-play Townsfolk. If mad that you are that specific Townsfolk, you register as good & as that Townsfolk, & that character registers as an evil Demon.

ref.name: Kidnapper
ref.ability: On your 1st night choose a good player: they become evil. They become good iff you die by execution.

ours.name: Simon
ours.ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Your alive Townsfolk neighbor on your left is poisoned.

ours.name: Matan
ours.ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. One night, the storyteller may add a game rule. The storyteller leaves a clue.

ours.name: Rachel
ours.ability: Each night* choose a player: they die, The 1st time Rachel publicly claims to be Rachel, you cannot be executed that day. That night, you may choose 2 players to swap characters. [-1 Outsider]

ours.name: Hannah
ours.ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. If there are 5 or more players alive, once per game, you have the option of killing a 2nd player at night.

ours.name: Butcher Three
ours.ability: Each day, after the 1st execution, the Butcher Threes may make 1 extra nomination together, decided by a majority vote among themselves. [+0 to +2 Butcher Three]
